task:
A baseline Zoom config file exists at /home/user/.config/zoomus.conf. In the `[chat.client]` section (the section header is literally `[chat.client]`), `Theme` is currently `light`.

Set `[chat.client]Theme` to `dark` so the Zoom chat client uses the dark theme. Save the file in-place at /home/user/.config/zoomus.conf. Do not modify any other keys.
